ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dances" (
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dance */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dance type */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dance shape */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication where the dance is listed */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the dance */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dance (e.g., social, performance) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the dance (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation of the dance (e.g., longwise, square) */,
  "music" TEXT /* Music type for the dance (e.g., jig, strathspey, reel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dances_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dances_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES dance_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dances_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dance_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dance type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the dance shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dance shape */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance shape was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance shape was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance being contributed to */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., edit, addition, deletion) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_dance_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_id") REFERENCES dances ("dance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dance data */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dance_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_id") REFERENCES dances ("dance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance */,
  "origin_date" TEXT /* Date when the dance originated */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country where the dance originated */,
  "origin_city" TEXT /* City where the dance originated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the origin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the origin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_origins_dance_id FOREIGN KEY ("dance_id") REFERENCES dances ("dance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dance_tags" (
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance-tag relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dance-tag relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_id", "tag_id")
)
